description: Create a Docker starter project with common container tasks

tasks.label: Init
tasks.description: Create Docker starter files from template folder

tasks.label: Build Image
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); docker build -t "$IMAGE" .

tasks.label: List Builds
tasks.description: List built images for this project name
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); docker images --filter reference="${IMAGE}*"

tasks.label: Run Container
tasks.description: Run a container from the built image
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); NAME="${IMAGE}-app"; docker rm -f "$NAME" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker run -d --name "$NAME" "$IMAGE"

tasks.label: Run Shell
tasks.description: Open an interactive shell inside the container
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); docker run --rm -it "$IMAGE" /bin/sh

tasks.label: Stop
tasks.description: Stop the running container for this project
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); NAME="${IMAGE}-app"; if docker ps -q --filter name=^/${NAME}$ | grep -q .; then docker stop "$NAME" >/dev/null && docker rm "$NAME" >/dev/null; elif docker ps -aq --filter name=^/${NAME}$ | grep -q .; then docker rm -f "$NAME" >/dev/null; else echo "No container found with name '$NAME'"; fi

tasks.label: Remove Image
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); NAME="${IMAGE}-app"; docker rm -f "$NAME" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; CIDS=$(docker ps -aq --filter ancestor="$IMAGE"); if [ -n "$CIDS" ]; then docker rm -f $CIDS >/dev/null; fi; docker rmi "$IMAGE"

tasks.label: Logs
tasks.description: Follow logs of the last running container
tasks.command: IMAGE=$(awk -F= '/^LABEL[[:space:]]+app.name=/{gsub(/"/,"",$2); print $2; exit}' Dockerfile); [ -n "$IMAGE" ] || IMAGE=$(basename "$PWD"); NAME="${IMAGE}-app"; if docker ps -aq --filter name=^/${NAME}$ | grep -q .; then docker logs -f "$NAME"; else echo "No container found with name '$NAME'. Run 'Run Container' first."; fi
